consumerPurpose: Resolve a home ZIP into Gridly's existing county and awareness-area/community selection model without displaying ZIP codes as awareness labels.

records.notes: Dayton primary local setup seed for LP051 foundation.
Liberty primary local setup seed for LP051 foundation.
Livingston seed validates ZIP-first architecture against registry-backed operational communities.
Houston seed intentionally resolves to an existing Houston awareness sub-area instead of changing presentation to ZIP language.
